Hardware Component File

SCRGen4_3100_11b_v1.11

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference SCRGen4_3100_11b_v1.11_20190613T164035.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 500000
Send ID 7E6
Receive ID 7EE
Functional Addr D3
Functional Name UDM

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "17",
    "supplier": "CONTINENTAL",
    "soft": "0AS1",
    "version": "3100"
  }
]
